mapper.select:
SELECT standing_id, snapshot_date,
season_id, season_year, season_start_date, season_end_date, current_matchday,
area_id, area_name, area_code, area_flag,
competition_id, competition_name, league_code, competition_type, competition_emblem,
stage, standing_type, standing_group,
team_id, team_name, team_short_name, team_tla, team_crest,
position, played_games, won, draw, lost, points, goals_for, goals_against, goal_difference,
form,
created_at, updated_at FROM football_league_standing WHERE snapshot_date = CURDATE() AND league_code = #{leagueCode} AND season_year = #{seasonYear} ORDER BY position ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO football_api_response_log ( snapshot_date, api_name, request_url, league_code, season_year, response_json ) VALUES ( #{snapshotDate}, #{apiName}, #{requestUrl}, #{leagueCode}, #{seasonYear}, CAST(#{responseJson} AS JSON) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE request_url = VALUES(request_url), response_json = VALUES(response_json), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO football_league_standing ( snapshot_date,
season_id, season_year, season_start_date, season_end_date, current_matchday,
area_id, area_name, area_code, area_flag,
competition_id, competition_name, league_code, competition_type, competition_emblem,
stage, standing_type, standing_group,
team_id, team_name, team_short_name, team_tla, team_crest,
position, played_games, won, draw, lost, points, goals_for, goals_against, goal_difference,
form ) VALUES ( #{snapshotDate},
#{seasonId}, #{seasonYear}, #{seasonStartDate}, #{seasonEndDate}, #{currentMatchday},
#{areaId}, #{areaName}, #{areaCode}, #{areaFlag},
#{competitionId}, #{competitionName}, #{leagueCode}, #{competitionType}, #{competitionEmblem},
#{stage}, #{standingType}, #{standingGroup},
#{teamId}, #{teamName}, #{teamShortName}, #{teamTla}, #{teamCrest},
#{position}, #{playedGames}, #{won}, #{draw}, #{lost}, #{points}, #{goalsFor}, #{goalsAgainst}, #{goalDifference},
#{form} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE season_id = VALUES(season_id), season_start_date = VALUES(season_start_date), season_end_date = VALUES(season_end_date), current_matchday = VALUES(current_matchday),
area_id = VALUES(area_id), area_name = VALUES(area_name), area_code = VALUES(area_code), area_flag = VALUES(area_flag),
competition_id = VALUES(competition_id), competition_name = VALUES(competition_name), competition_type = VALUES(competition_type), competition_emblem = VALUES(competition_emblem),
stage = VALUES(stage), standing_type = VALUES(standing_type), standing_group = VALUES(standing_group),
team_name = VALUES(team_name), team_short_name = VALUES(team_short_name), team_tla = VALUES(team_tla), team_crest = VALUES(team_crest),
position = VALUES(position), played_games = VALUES(played_games), won = VALUES(won), draw = VALUES(draw), lost = VALUES(lost), points = VALUES(points), goals_for = VALUES(goals_for), goals_against = VALUES(goals_against), goal_difference = VALUES(goal_difference), form = VALUES(form),
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
